request.query: From these preprocess summaries, list every distinct subsection-style title card claimed to appear in the video, with approximate timestamps or segments, and separately list non-subsection text displays that should be excluded such as the opening production logo and end credits. Do not assume completeness beyond what is explicitly claimed.
text_contexts: seg_001 overall_summary/captions: opening production logo 'Turtle Canyon Comedy' / 'PRESENTS'; then living room scene with no subsection title indicated.
seg_002 overall_summary/captions: title card 'THE DRINKS' around 60-66s and title card 'THE BILL' around 67-72s.
seg_003 overall_summary/captions: title card 'THE FART' around 137-141s.
seg_004 overall_summary/captions: title card 'THE PREP' around 188-201s.
seg_005 overall_summary/captions: title card 'THE INTERROGATION' around 244-261s.
seg_006 overall_summary/captions: end credits from about 300s onward.
